## PR #171 — Fix hit log #N slot + raw team ID for orphaned saves

**Branch:** `copilot/copilotfix-bug-a-j` → `copilot/handle-quirks-and-issues`  
**Bugs:** Bug A (hit log shows `#N` slot) · Bug J (orphaned save shows raw team ID)  
**Commits:** 2 · **Changed files:** 5 (4 src + qa-report)  
**Last push:** 2026-03-12T19:51 · **+125 / −123**

### CI status

| Check                   | Result  |
| ----------------------- | ------- |
| lint                    | ✅ Pass |
| build                   | ✅ Pass |
| E2E chromium shards 1–3 | ✅ Pass |
| E2E webkit shards 1–3   | ✅ Pass |
| Update snapshots        | ✅ Pass |

### Changes reviewed

**`src/features/gameplay/context/index.tsx`** — Added `batterName?: string` to `PlayLogEntry`.
Optional field; backward-compatible with all existing saves that lack it. ✅

**`src/features/gameplay/context/hitBall.ts`** — `processConfirmedHit` resolves batter name at
hit time:

1. `playerOverrides[team][playerId].nickname` (trimmed) — custom team players
2. `generateRoster(base.teams[battingTeam]).batters.find(p => p.id === playerId)?.name` — stock
   teams
3. `undefined` → graceful `#N` fallback in UI for old saves

Spread `...(batterName ? { batterName } : {})` keeps log entries lean. ✅

**`src/features/gameplay/components/HitLog/index.tsx`** — Removed `useCustomTeams` hook and
`resolveTeamLabel` import entirely. Renders `entry.batterName ?? \`#${entry.batterNum}\``and
reads team names from`teamLabels[entry.team]` (pre-resolved at game-start, so deleted teams
always show their original label). ✅

**`src/features/gameplay/components/HitLog/hitLog.test.tsx`** — Old 50-line `vi.mock` block
replaced with two lines using `makeContextValue` from `@test/testHelpers`. Three new focused
tests: `batterName` renders over slot, `#N` fallback, and orphaned-team label resolved from
`teamLabels`. ✅

### Verdict

✅ **Ready to merge.** Correct, surgical, well-tested, all CI green.

## PR #172 — Fix Resume button after FINAL + suppress updateProgress error

**Branch:** `copilot/copilotfix-game-over-resume-issue` → `copilot/handle-quirks-and-issues`  
**Bugs:** Bug C (Resume button persists after FINAL) · Bug 3 (redundant `updateProgress` error)  
**Commits:** 3 · **Changed files:** 9 (8 src + qa-report)  
**Last push:** 2026-03-12T20:10 · **+226 / −59**  
**CI:** 🔁 Running (new push at 20:10)

### Changes reviewed

**`src/storage/types.ts`** — `onGameOver: () => void` added to `AppShellOutletContext`. JSDoc
correctly identifies the caller chain: `GameInner → GamePage → Game → AppShell`. ✅ (Updated from
prior "Called by GamePage" to more precise "Called by GameInner (via GamePage/Game)".)

**`src/features/gameplay/components/AppShell/index.tsx`** — `handleGameOver` clears
`hasActiveSession`. Properly memoized with `useCallback` and included in the `useMemo` dep array.
✅

**`src/features/gameplay/components/Game/GameInner.tsx`** — `onGameOver?: ()=>void` prop fires via
a `useEffect` with `gameOverFiredRef` ref guard:

- Fires once when `gameOver` transitions `false → true`
- Resets ref when `gameOver` goes `false` (new game) — so the callback fires again for the next
  game
- No spurious calls on re-renders after game over ✅

**`src/features/saves/hooks/useRxdbGameSync.ts`** — Refactored from positional `boolean` to
options object `{ wasAlreadyFinalOnLoad? }`. `wasAlreadyFinalOnLoadRef` is updated every render so
the game-over effect always reads the latest value (handles mid-session save load where flag
changes from `true → false`). Skips `updateProgress` write when flag is `true`. ✅

**Tests** — Two new `GameInner` tests cover `false→true` firing and no double-firing. New
`useRxdbGameSync` mid-session test: `wasAlreadyFinalOnLoad` changing from `true → false`
mid-session, then game over should still call `updateProgress` ✅

### Verdict

✅ **Code approved.** Implementation is correct; refactors address all prior review points.
Waiting for fresh CI run to confirm green.

---

## PR #173 — Fix "undefined" leaking in save/team import errors

**Branch:** `copilot/fix-bug-f-and-bug-5` → `copilot/handle-quirks-and-issues`  
**Bugs:** Bug F (save import leaks "undefined") · Bug 5 (team import leaks "undefined")  
**Commits:** 3 · **Changed files:** 5 (4 src + qa-report)  
**Last push:** 2026-03-12T20:07 · **+122 / −63**  
**CI:** 🔁 Running (copilot review agent in progress + webkit snapshot running)

### Changes reviewed

**`src/features/saves/storage/saveStore.ts`** — Two fixes:

1. `importRxdbSave`: `typeof version !== "number"` guard fires before version comparison.
   Error message: "Invalid save file: missing or unrecognised format. Please export a save from
   the app and try again." — user-friendly, no raw token leakage. ✅
2. `updateProgress`: `if (!doc) return;` (was `throw`) — silent resolve is the correct contract
   when a save is deleted while a game is in progress. JSDoc documents the new contract. ✅

**`src/features/customTeams/storage/customTeamExportImport.ts`** — Two new guards before the
existing discriminator checks:

1. `typeof obj["formatVersion"] !== "number"` — fires first for fully malformed objects
2. `typeof obj["type"] !== "string"` — fires second, prevents `"expected type X, got undefined"`
   leaking through the existing error template

Guard order is correct: structurally invalid objects are rejected before reaching value checks. ✅
Well-formed-but-wrong bundles (wrong `type`, unsupported `formatVersion`) still produce their
specific errors unchanged. ✅

**Tests** — `saveStore.test.ts`: stale "throws on unknown saveId" test updated to `.resolves`;
new test asserts `{}` import shows "Invalid"/"format" and does NOT contain "undefined"/"null"/"NaN".
`customTeamExportImport.test.ts`: same pattern. Both match the E2E spec assertion
`/Make sure to export using/i`. ✅

### Verdict

✅ **Code approved.** Minimal, targeted guards with clean user-facing messages. Waiting for CI.

---

## PR #174 — Fix save delete confirmation + back button navigation

**Branch:** `copilot/copilotfix-bug-b-and-bug-g` → `copilot/handle-quirks-and-issues`  
**Bugs:** Bug B (save delete has no confirmation) · Bug G (back button loses team context)  
**Commits:** 3 · **Changed files:** 7 (6 src + qa-report)  
**Last push:** 2026-03-12T20:06 · **+200 / −62**  
**CI:** ⚠️ lint ❌ (base-branch Prettier issue — **fixed in this commit**) · build ✅ · E2E
running

### Root cause of lint failure

`format:check` failed on `.github/docs/pr-status-2026-03-12.md` which lives on the base branch
(`copilot/handle-quirks-and-issues`). The file had Prettier formatting issues. **Fixed in this
commit** — re-running CI on #174 should now pass lint.

### Changes reviewed

**`src/features/saves/components/SaveSlotList/index.tsx`** — Delete button now guards with
`window.confirm("Delete this save? This cannot be undone.")` before calling `onDelete`. ✅  
Matches the team-deletion confirm pattern already used in `ManageTeamsScreen`. ✅

**`src/features/careerStats/pages/PlayerCareerPage/index.tsx`** — Back button replaced
`navigate(-1)` with explicit `navigate(teamParam ? \`/stats?team=${encodeURIComponent(teamParam)}\` : "/stats")`. Uses `useSearchParams`to read the`team`query param injected by`CareerStatsPage`when navigating to a player. ✅  `encodeURIComponent` used correctly for URL value. ✅

**`src/features/saves/components/SaveSlotList/SaveSlotList.test.tsx`** — Switched from
`vi.spyOn(window, "confirm")` to `vi.stubGlobal("confirm", confirmMock)` + `beforeEach` reset.
Matches the `TeamListItem.test.tsx` pattern from the codebase. ✅  
Five tests: renders, shows button, calls confirm, calls onDelete on `true`, does NOT call onDelete
on `false`. ✅

**`src/features/saves/components/SavesModal/SavesModal.test.tsx`** and
**`src/features/saves/pages/SavesPage/SavesPage.test.tsx`** — `confirm` stub added where existing
delete-click tests appear. ✅

**`src/features/careerStats/pages/PlayerCareerPage/PlayerCareerPage.test.tsx`** — Two new tests:
back button with `?team=...` navigates to `/stats?team=...`; without `teamParam` navigates to
`/stats`. ✅

### Verdict

✅ **Code approved.** Both fixes are correct and well-tested. Lint failure is a base-branch issue
(fixed here, not in this PR). Re-trigger CI to verify.

## PR #175 — Fix four copy bugs in HelpContent (D/E/H/I)

**Branch:** `copilot/fix-copilot-quirks-and-issues` → `copilot/handle-quirks-and-issues`  
**Bugs:** Bug D (Instant speed undocumented) · Bug E (Starter Pitcher undocumented) · Bug H (wrong
emoji) · Bug I (stats described as editable)  
**Commits:** 3 · **Changed files:** 2 (1 src + qa-report)  
**Last push:** 2026-03-12T20:08 · **+92 / −60**  
**CI:** ⚠️ lint ❌ (base-branch Prettier issue — **fixed in this commit**) · build ✅ · E2E
running

### Root cause of lint failure

Same as #174 — `pr-status-2026-03-12.md` Prettier issue on base branch. Fixed in this commit.

### Changes reviewed

`src/features/help/components/HelpContent/index.tsx` only. No runtime logic changes.

| Bug | Before                                  | After                                                                                                                                                                        |
| --- | --------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| D   | "Choose Slow / Normal / Fast speed"     | "Choose **Slow / Normal / Fast / Instant** speed … Instant plays pitches with no delay between them and still pauses for Manager Mode decisions."                            |
| E   | No mention of Starting Pitcher selector | New bullet: "When managing a team, a **Starting Pitcher** dropdown appears during pre-game setup — choose which eligible pitcher starts the game before clicking Play Ball." |
| H   | `🔔 slider = chime & fanfare volume`    | `🎵 slider = music + in-game chimes/fanfare volume`                                                                                                                          |
| I   | "Edit names, stats, and positions"      | "Edit player names and positions … **Note:** player stat values are determined at creation and cannot be changed afterward."                                                 |

All four changes correctly reflect actual app behavior. No test updates needed (no existing tests
assert on these exact copy strings). ✅

### Verdict

✅ **Code approved.** All four copy fixes are accurate and complete. Lint failure is base-branch
(fixed here). Re-trigger CI to verify.

## PR #176 — Seed two demo teams on first launch

**Branch:** `copilot/copilotadd-demo-teams` → `copilot/handle-quirks-and-issues`  
**Feature:** New-1 — brand-new users get two starter teams automatically  
**Commits:** 2 · **Changed files:** 4 (3 src + qa-report)  
**Last push:** 2026-03-12T19:56 · **+275 / −57**  
**CI:** ⚠️ snapshot update (chromium) failed; copilot agent re-running

### Changes reviewed

**`src/features/customTeams/generation/demoTeams.ts`** _(new file)_ — `DEMO_TEAMS: DemoTeamDef[]`
defines two teams:

- **Riverside Rockets (RIV):** 9 lineup + 4 bench + 4 pitchers
- **Lakewood Legends (LAK):** 9 lineup + 4 bench + 4 pitchers

Stat compliance verified:

- Hitters: contact/power/speed each in `[40, 70]`, all sums = 150 (`HITTER_STAT_CAP`) ✅
- Pitchers: velocity/control/movement each in `[40, 70]`, all sums = 160 (`PITCHER_STAT_CAP`) ✅

No player IDs hardcoded — all generated by `createCustomTeam`. ✅

**`src/shared/hooks/useSeedDemoTeams.ts`** _(new file)_ — Module-level `_seedAttempted` flag
prevents duplicate seeding under React concurrent rendering or strict-mode double-mount. Async
`seedIfEmpty()`:

1. Checks `CustomTeamStore.listCustomTeams({ withRoster: false })` — skips if any teams exist
2. Calls `createCustomTeam` for each definition
3. Errors caught with `appLog.warn` — no unhandled promise rejection ✅

`mapDemoPlayer` helper converts `DemoPlayerDef → TeamPlayer` including `id: generatePlayerId()`.
Note: `CustomTeamStore.createCustomTeam` requires roster `TeamPlayer` objects to already have
`id` fields (store does not generate them). This is handled correctly. ✅

**`src/features/gameplay/components/RootLayout/index.tsx`** — `useSeedDemoTeams()` called on every
app start. `RootLayout` wraps all routes so the check runs once on launch without coupling to any
specific page. No-op on subsequent launches. ✅

### Snapshot failure note

The `Update snapshots (chromium)` job failed — this is expected when new UI is added that changes
visual output. The copilot agent is re-running to regenerate the baselines. ✅

### Verdict

✅ **Code approved.** Implementation is correct and spec-compliant. Snapshot re-generation in
progress.

## Merge order recommendation

PRs #171, #172, #173, #174, and #175 are fully independent (disjoint file sets) and can be merged
in any order once CI is green. PR #176 should be merged last since it also modifies `RootLayout`
which is touched by #172.

| Order | PR                     | Notes                                     |
| ----- | ---------------------- | ----------------------------------------- |
| 1     | #171                   | All CI green — merge immediately          |
| 2–5   | #172, #173, #174, #175 | Independent; any order once CI green      |
| 6     | #176                   | After #172 (both touch `RootLayout` area) |
